creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 222653
Xorg log

I'm trying to install FreeBSD in a Hyper-V VM, and have installed Xorg.

I can use the keyboard in the console, and the mouse in Xorg. However, I cannot use the keyboard in Xorg. This happens on 12.2-RELEASE and 13.0-BETA3.

Attached is the Xorg log and the "libinput list-devices" output.

Hyper-V is running on Windows 10 LTSC 2019 on a machine from work. Since this machine is heavily locked down and doesn't let me dual-boot or let me install third party apps, I can't use VirtualBox or anything else. I can create VMs with Hyper-V and sideload a FreeBSD ISO.

This locked-down system is the only way to log in when I go on-call in April/May. At the same time, my home systems which dual-boot Windows 10 and FreeBSD-CURRENT only have a Windows 10 Home license which lacks Hyper-V.
